mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TB_POPUP WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_POPUP SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, WIDTH = #{width}, HEIGHT = #{height}, TOP_POS = #{topPos}, LEFT_POS = #{leftPos}, START_DT = #{startDt}, END_DT = #{endDt}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE POP_SEQ = #{popSeq}
UPDATE TB_POPUP SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE POP_SEQ = #{popSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TB_POPUP WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN START_DT AND END_DT ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
